top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.laps = total_laps.total_laps_in_race THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN (
    SELECT raceId, MAX(lap) AS total_laps_in_race
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')
    GROUP BY raceId
) total_laps ON r.raceId = total_laps.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.laps = (SELECT MAX(lap) FROM lapTimes WHERE raceId = r.raceId) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.laps = max_laps.max_lap_count THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId

    FROM lapTimes

) max_laps ON r.raceId = max_laps.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.laps = total_laps.total_laps_in_race THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN (
    SELECT raceId, MAX(lap) AS total_laps_in_race
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')
    GROUP BY raceId
) total_laps ON r.raceId = total_laps.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';
